_comment: Shared unit-SYMBOL test vectors for the Rust resolver (rust/core/src/project_units) and the TS resolver (packages/parser/src/project-units.ts). Each case is a minimal but complete ISO-10303-21 file. `measures` lists a property/quantity measure value type and the expected display unit: `symbol` (null = no unit shown) and `siScale` (multiply a value in this unit to get its SI base). Both resolvers must agree on every case. All fixtures are synthetic.

cases.name: vzt_like_mm_area_volume_derived_flowrate
imperial_foot_length
degree_plane_angle
mass_kilogram_and_monetary_eur
mass_density_derived_unit
no_unit_assignment_defaults
